zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Sotheron於1464年1月1日出生在英國越可爾霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾時，她的父親William Sothern25歲，母親Alice Spalding20歲。她於1487年與Thomas Millington在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1509年4月2日在她的家鄉享年45歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Sotheron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Southern
meanings: English (Lancashire): nickname from Middle English s(o)uthern(e), sothron ‘southern’ (Old English sūtherne, Old Norse suthrænn), for someone ‘from the south’, particularly as a northern English nickname for someone from the south of the country and as a Scottish nickname for an Englishman.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Sotheron was born on 1 January 1464, in Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, England, her father, William Sothern, was 25 and her mother, Alice Spalding, was 20. She married Thomas Millington in 1487, in Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 2 April 1509, in her hometown, at the age of 45, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Thomas Millington en 1487, à Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 avril 1509, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Holme Upon Spalding Moor, East Yorkshire: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 홀--스팔딩-모어
ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Sotheron(이)가 1464년 1월 1일 영국 요르크실르 홀--스팔딩-모어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Sothern(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Spalding(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1487년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 홀--스팔딩-모어에서 Thomas Millington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1509년 4월 2일 그녀의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Sotheron nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1464, em Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Sothern, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Alice Spalding, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Millington em 1487, em Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Sotheron родилась 1 января 1464 г. в местности холме-он-спалдинг-мур, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Sothern было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Spalding, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Millington в 1487 г. в местности холме-он-спалдинг-мур, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 2 апреля 1509 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.
